name: Assault Blackwing - Raikiri the Rain Shower
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アサルト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>驟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>う</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のライキリ
name_jp_rom: Asaruto Burakku Fezā - Shūu no Raikiri
name_jp_tl: Assault Black Feather - Raikiri the Sudden Shower
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Synchro Summoned using a "Blackwing" monster as Material, it is treated as a Tuner monster while face-up on the field. Once per turn: You can target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of other "Blackwing" monsters you control; destroy them.
mnst_eff:

action: Gains effects if Synchro Summoned using specific Synchro Material
stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
